message:
feat(fcp-mesh): add benchmarks and update dependencies

Adds performance benchmarking infrastructure and updates project
dependencies.

## Benchmarks (New)
- Add crates/fcp-mesh/benches/ directory with criterion benchmarks
- Benchmark mesh node join/leave operations
- Benchmark gossip message propagation latency
- Benchmark admission control throughput

## Dependency Updates
- Add criterion dependency to workspace Cargo.toml
- Update fcp-mesh Cargo.toml with benchmark configuration
- Update Cargo.lock with resolved dependencies

## Test Vectors
- Refresh enrollment request test vectors
- Refresh simulation request test vectors

These benchmarks establish baselines for mesh networking performance
and help identify regressions during development.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive"] }
